title: Malty Raw Ligurian Sevaiiya Tiramisu
description: A creamy, pillowy dessert showcasing Ligurian sevaiiya, baked to perfection in a wood-fired oven. This raw-friendly tiramisu is perfect for a brunch or breakfast gathering.
instructions: Combine sevaiiya and cocoa powder in a large bowl.
Add 150ml of non-dairy milk and stir until the mixture is well combined.
Pour the mixture into a wood-fired oven preheated to 400F (200C) for 10-12 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the tiramisu from the oven and let it cool completely.
Once cool, refrigerate the tiramisu for at least 2 hours before serving.
Before serving, sprinkle with additional cocoa powder and serve chilled.
